summary: Iteration 3 verified three new Mirror Lens enhancements on Heartbound (frontend-only). PASSED: (1) DRY toggleMirror — verified all three entry points (KeyM, HUD data-testid=mirror-lens-button, MobileControls data-testid=mobile-mirror) drive the same mirror-overlay opacity transitions (0→1 and 1→0). Code review confirms single useCallback `toggleMirror` referenced by KeyM useEffect, HUD onToggleMirror prop, and MobileControls onMirror prop. (2) Web Audio chime — window.AudioContext detected as available; playMirrorChime invoked from toggleMirror with variant 'on'/'off'; ZERO console errors / pageerrors observed across many toggles. Cannot directly verify audible output in headless Playwright (best-effort per request). (3) Dialogue subtitle hidden label — code review confirms correct implementation in DialogueBox.jsx (renders data-testid=dialogue-hidden-label only when mirrorActive && hiddenLabel && speaker) and GameScreen.jsx buildScript() injects hiddenLabel from CITIZENS[].hiddenLabel and SPEAKER_HIDDEN_LABELS map (Tara='Myth keeper', Mural Voice='A door, a memory', Shadow Twin='Wounded, protective self', Kavi='Loyal companion'). NOT DIRECTLY VERIFIED end-to-end in browser: walking the hero via ArrowRight did not move the Phaser hero in headless Playwright (hero stayed at spawn x≈230 across all attempts), and the auto-fire Tara dialogue tween in ch3 (delayedCall 2400ms + 1500ms tween) did not advance the hero either — meaning script:start for citizen/tara-dialogue never emitted during tests. The narration overlay 'An elder waits in the cave...' stays open. This appears to be a Phaser game-loop/keyboard-focus limitation under headless automation, NOT an app bug (manual verification by main agent recommended). PASSED: First-use tooltip (data-testid=mirror-tooltip with exact text 'Mirror Lens reveals what the heart is hiding.', dismiss via data-testid=dismiss-mirror-tooltip persists). PASSED: Regression — title /  start-game-button → /character navigation still works.

integration_issues.flow: Hero arrow-key movement & Phaser auto-tween (ch3 Tara walk)
integration_issues.issue: In headless Playwright, ArrowRight keydown does not advance the Phaser hero sprite (hero remains at spawn x). Phaser delayedCall tween in _setupChapter3 also did not run within 6.5s after mount. Could be Phaser keyboard focus / requestAnimationFrame throttling under headless. Not blocking — visual rendering of mirror overlay, hidden Phaser labels, dialogue box, and tooltip all work correctly.

verified_flows: Mirror overlay opacity 0 at mount; 0→1 on M key (within 700ms); 1→0 on second M key
HUD mirror-lens-button click toggles overlay opacity 0↔1
data-testid=mobile-mirror present in DOM and click toggles overlay 0↔1 (clicked via JS since hidden on desktop viewport)
First-use tooltip data-testid=mirror-tooltip appears once on first activation with exact text 'Mirror Lens reveals what the heart is hiding.'
data-testid=dismiss-mirror-tooltip closes tooltip, persists mirrorLensTooltipShown to localStorage 'heartbound.save.v1'
window.AudioContext available; no console errors during repeated mirror toggles
Phaser canvas hidden labels (Exhaustion / Loneliness / Unspoken grief on ch1, Myth keeper on ch3) render correctly when mirror is ON (visual confirmation)
Regression: title screen start-game-button -> /character route still works
not_verified_due_to_headless_phaser: Citizen dialogue subtitle hidden label (Exhaustion/Loneliness/Unspoken grief) — requires walking hero next to citizen and pressing Space, but ArrowRight didn't move Phaser hero
Tara dialogue auto-fire on /game/3 — Phaser tween that walks hero to x=0.45W didn't execute, so script:start{name:'tara-dialogue'} never emitted, dialogue stayed on narration
End-to-end M-key toggle DURING an open citizen/Tara dialogue causing data-testid=dialogue-hidden-label to materialize
action_items: Manual smoke test recommended for the dialogue-subtitle hidden label end-to-end (walk to citizen + Space in ch1; wait for Tara auto-dialogue in ch3) — code review confirms correctness but headless Phaser blocked the runtime trigger.
Optional: expose window.__heartboundEvents or a debug hatch to programmatically emit gameEvents.script:start so automated tests can verify dialogue flows without depending on Phaser keyboard input.
critical_code_review_comments: GameScreen.jsx line 221-229 — toggleMirror correctly extracted as a single useCallback; M-key useEffect (line 326-337) and HUD onToggleMirror + MobileControls onMirror all reference the SAME callback. DRY refactor properly executed.
GameScreen.jsx line 257-260 — Correct: mirror-only lines are filtered out at script:start time when mirrorRef.current is false. This matches the spec note about 2-line vs 3-line citizen dialogue.

DialogueBox.jsx line 31 — `const showHidden = mirrorActive && hiddenLabel && speaker;` is correct guard. Hidden label only renders when speaker exists, which excludes narration lines (speaker null) — good.

sound.js — playMirrorChime correctly guards `typeof window === 'undefined'` and AudioContext availability; uses gentle envelope; both 'on'/'off' variants present. Note: getCtx() always tries ctx.resume() which is correct for browsers that auto-suspend the AudioContext before any user gesture.

GameScreen.jsx is now ~410 LoC (was 360 in iteration 2). Still under 700 threshold but trending upward; recommend extracting useDialogueSequencer and event-wiring useEffect into separate hooks in a future refactor.
useGameStore.js — mirrorLensTooltipShown persisted correctly via spread-merge load logic (backward compatible). No regression observed.

success_rate.frontend: 5/5 directly verifiable scenarios passed (toggle DRY, audio chime non-error, overlay, tooltip, regression); 1 scenario (dialogue subtitle hidden label end-to-end) blocked by Phaser headless limitation — code review confirms correctness

seed_data_creation: localStorage 'heartbound.save.v1' pre-seeded with {mirrorLensTooltipShown:true} for non-first-use scenarios; cleared for first-use tooltip verification
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dialogue-subtitle hidden label feature is implemented correctly per code review. Direct browser verification requires triggering script:start gameEvents — but Phaser keyboard input (ArrowRight) and time.delayedCall tweens did not advance the hero sprite under headless Playwright. To verify in future iterations, either (a) wait significantly longer (~10s+) on /game/3 for the Tara tween to complete and emit script:start, (b) expose a window-level debug hook to fire gameEvents.script:start directly, or (c) verify manually in non-headless browser. All other Mirror Lens features (toggle, overlay, tooltip, audio call site) are verified at https://threshold-awakens-1.preview.emergentagent.com. Use localStorage key 'heartbound.save.v1' with field mirrorLensTooltipShown to skip tooltip. Mirror overlay opacity transitions take ~700-1000ms — use ≥1200ms waits after toggle for safe assertions.
rca_of_the_issue: No app bugs found. The headless test limitation is environmental (Phaser game loop / keyboard focus under headless Chromium), not a Heartbound bug — visual rendering confirms Phaser is running (mirror overlay, hidden labels, NPC sprites all draw).
